doctrine.description: Asymmetric denial by rapidly altering the landscape and introducing their own brand of mayhem, rendering the original chaotic effect's primary advantage impotent.

explosives.function: Rapid dismantling of structures and instantaneous reshaping of the landscape

acids.function: Strategic weakening of key structural points, preparing an area for a more dramatic collapse or alteration

blunt force.function: Direct application of immense physical power to recreate the face of the landscape instantly

leadership.description: The highest rank belongs to the veteran who has survived the longest, a leadership paradigm based on survival meritocracy

verge cities.description: Sequestered existence, managed by 'Re-Assigned' civilians, a perpetually tense, stratified micro-society defined by inherent sociological friction

national sports.description: Sophisticated piece of societal engineering, created for the Chaos Corps but broadcast to the populace, serving as a pressure-release valve, live-fire training exercise, and propaganda tool
